subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Create an ADR directory in the root of your project, example usage: ' adr init doc/architecture/decisions'

args.name: Location where to create the ADR, example 'adr init doc/architecture/decisions'

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Create a new, numbered ADR file

options.description: Create a new ADR that supercedes a previous one (ADR 9, for example), use the -s option

args.name: ADR name
args.description: Name for the ADR separated with '-'
